name: poker-trainer
description: Learn poker like a trader. Six layers from hand rankings to Bayesian deviation, with CFR solvers for Kuhn and Leduc that converge in the browser.

scripts.test: node test/engine.test.js && node test/range.test.js && node test/drills.test.js && node test/soak.js && node test/cfr.test.js && node test/leduc.test.js && node test/river.test.js && node test/turn.test.js
